title: Wittmackia altocaririensis
intro: Wittmackia altocaririensis, also known as 'Alto Cariri', is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Marantaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of digestive disorders and providing protection against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Wittmackia altocaririensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Wittmackia altocaririensis is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
